channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [HOT] Solid State Logic|Solid State Logic is offering 69% off on LMC+ compressor plugin for Win & Mac.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 69% - Desarrollador: Solid State Logic - Finaliza: 2026-05-14

item.title: [HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica Audio Color Week – up to 75% off on selected plugins.?ENDSSOON!?NEW

[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Sync Audio|Sync Audio is offering MegaMod, a plugin to modulate any plugin, as a free download only this weekend. Available for Win & Mac. Use the coupon code: PRODUCTIONEXPERT.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Goodhertz|Goodhertz has released LA-210, a free compressor/clipper plugin (beta) for Mac & Win.?NEW
[HOT] IK Multimedia|IK Multimedia 30th Anniversary Deals – 66% off on Brown Sound Bundle, including all 3 Brown Sound TONEX Signature Collections.?NEW
[HOT] IK Multimedia|Get 73% off TONEX MAX by IK Multimedia. The discounted price is $79.99
[SAVE BIG] Sonic Nomad|Get 85% off Cheap Keys by Sonic Nomad for $15 (Normally $99)
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 74% off Oxford Dynamic EQ by Sonnox. The discounted price is $69
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 75% off Oxford Inflator by Sonnox. The discounted price is $39
[HOT] Sonnox|Get 73% off Oxford Limiter by Sonnox. The discounted price is $69
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Ebbandflow|Ebbandflow has released deFORM cinematic synth for Mac & Win. The plugin is available as a free download for a limited time
[HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica Audio has released Rust 2 passive EQ plugin for Mac & Win. The intro is 60% off
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] NovoNotes|NovoNotes has released SnapClip clipper plugin for Mac & Win. The plugin is available as a free download
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Pulsar Audio|Pulsar Audio Smasher plugin is again available as a free download
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Pulsar Audio - Finaliza: Unknown
